testCases.title: Verify navigation to Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify team search functionality
steps: Verification: Expect the search results to load with 'Toronto Maple Leafs' displayed
expected: Search results are displayed for 'Toronto Maple Leafs'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to page 5 using pagination
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=5'

testCases.title: Verify changing records per page to 50
steps: Select number of records per page to 50
Verification: Expect the number of records displayed to change to 50 per page.
expected: Number of records displayed changes to 50 per page.
